cabinet.title: REFERRAL REWARDS
cabinet.subtitle: Share your code, track canonical reward lifecycle, and keep customer growth separate from partner mechanics.

hero.enabledHint: Current backend rate: {rate}. Reward eligibility and stacking are always decided server-side.
hero.disabledHint: The program is paused by backend policy. Existing rewards remain visible for traceability.

errors.partialDescription: The cockpit keeps available sections visible while the unavailable growth endpoint recovers.

share.title: Your referral code
share.description: Share the link or code with friends. The frontend never decides discount eligibility; checkout and redeem flows ask the backend.
share.message: Join CyberVPN with my referral code {code}: {link}

rules.title: What this page will not guess

backendTruth.title: Backend is the source of truth
backendTruth.description: The UI shows decisions returned by backend contracts and does not compute reward eligibility or stacking locally.

nonWithdrawable.title: Referral rewards are growth credits
nonWithdrawable.description: Referral rewards are presented as customer growth rewards, not partner payouts or withdrawable earnings.

partnerHidden.title: Partner mechanics stay out
partnerHidden.description: Partner commissions, reseller tools, payout statements and traffic controls are intentionally not exposed here.

holdWindow.title: Hold window is explicit
holdWindow.description: Backend reports the current reward hold window as {days} days. Pending rewards can still be reversed by policy.

caps.title: Cap usage
caps.description: Soft progress bars help users understand reward velocity without exposing fraud or risk engine internals.

lifecycle.title: Canonical reward states
lifecycle.description: Rewards move through backend-owned states. Pending rewards are on hold; available rewards are usable according to account policy.

notifications.title: Growth notifications
notifications.description: Referral rewards and invite updates are surfaced through durable growth notifications.
notifications.empty: No referral notifications are visible right now.

title: REWARDS HUB
subtitle: Manage invites, gift codes, referral sharing, and reward activity from one place.
shareDescription: Use your referral code with friends and keep invite access separate from checkout discounts.
shareMessage: Join CyberVPN with my referral code: {code}
programUnavailable: The referral program is temporarily unavailable. Your existing invites stay visible here, but new referral actions may be paused until the program is restored.

overview.activeInvitesHint: Unused invite codes ready to share.
overview.totalReferralsHint: Accounts attributed to your current referral program.
overview.totalRewardsHint: Current backend reward total for this account.
overview.currentRateHint: Program rate returned by the current referral contract.

redeemSubtitle: Invite and gift codes redeem here. Promo and referral discounts still apply later in checkout.
redeemSuccessInvite: Invite redeemed. Added {days} free days to your account.
redeemSuccessGift: Gift redeemed. Added {plan} for {days} days to your account.

notifications.title: Growth notifications
notifications.subtitle: Durable updates for invites, referral rewards, and gift codes.
notifications.empty: No growth notifications are visible right now.
notifications.detailsEmpty: Select a notification to inspect delivery details.
notifications.supportActionHint: If the automated recovery path is blocked, use the guided repair or support flow below.
notifications.noDeliveryHistory: No delivery history is attached to this notification.

preferences.title: Delivery preferences
preferences.subtitle: Choose which growth events stay in-app, email, or Telegram.
preferences.note: In-app preferences control this rewards inbox. Email and Telegram plan external delivery without creating a second source of truth.

promoNoteBody: Promo and referral discounts belong in checkout. This hub handles invite and gift redemption without creating a second pricing source of truth.

giftPurchase.title: Buy Gift VPN
giftPurchase.subtitle: Create a gift checkout for a friend without mixing it into referral or promo pricing.
giftPurchase.successPaymentPending: Gift checkout created. Complete payment in the opened window.
giftPurchase.successIssued: Gift issued successfully. Share this code: {code}

errors.planRequired: Choose a plan before creating a gift checkout.

invitesSubtitle: Codes issued to your account and their current availability.
giftsSubtitle: Purchased or issued gift codes that you can share or track.
activitySubtitle: Current backend contract still reports referral activity as reward entries tied to the active program.
